mapper.select: SELECT * FROM rag_chat_messages WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY message_order DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT session_id FROM rag_chat_messages WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rag_chat_messages WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
SELECT * FROM rag_chat_messages WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND completed = FALSE ORDER BY message_order ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM rag_chat_messages WHERE type = #{type}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rag_chat_messages ( session_id, type, content, message_order, created_at, updated_at, completed ) VALUES ( #{entity.session.id}, #{entity.type}, #{entity.content}, #{entity.messageOrder}, COALESCE(#{entity.createdAt}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{entity.updatedAt}, NOW()), COALESCE(#{entity.completed}, TRUE) )
mapper.update: UPDATE rag_chat_messages SET type = #{entity.type}, content = #{entity.content}, message_order = #{entity.messageOrder}, updated_at = COALESCE(#{entity.updatedAt}, NOW()), completed = #{entity.completed} WHERE id = #{entity.id}
